name: Meat Loaf Teriyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the last 2 (brown sugar and soy sauce) in a large bowl.
2. Form the mixture into 1 or 2 loaves and place them in a 9 x 9-inch baking dish.
3. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
4. Remove from the oven and drain off any excess grease.
5. Mix together the brown sugar and soy sauce.
6. Pour the mixture over the meat loaf.
7. Return to the oven and bake for another 30 minutes.
8. Remove the meat loaf to a serving platter.
9. Serve the sauce either poured over the sliced meat loaf or on the side.
